data.description:
## What
Enrich the llm-prompts overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: ui-artifact leakage, domain-mismatch (reimplementing an existing prompt-library entry), prompt/contract/output-schema drift on rebar's own LLM surfaces.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-llm-prompts.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the llm-prompts overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] llm-prompts overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: llm-prompts overlay enrichment
